name: LUMIREE WATER
intro: A surreal, hyperreal CGI campaign for Lumiree Water — a premium hydration brand built around the idea that purity is spectacle. Every drop, a universe.

caseImages.alt: Lumiree x LEGO — surreal construction scene with colorful blocks exploding into clouds
caseImages.caption: [ 01 ] LUMIREE × LEGO — Imagination Campaign

caseImages.alt: Apple-inspired minimal CGI ad — fluffy white logo sculpture
caseImages.caption: [ 02 ] LUMIREE × APPLE — Minimalist Series

caseImages.alt: Youth-focused colorful beverage can in retro pop art style
caseImages.caption: [ 03 ] LUMIREE YOUTH — Next Gen Campaign

caseImages.alt: IKEA-inspired surreal lamp made of bread and toast stacks
caseImages.caption: [ 04 ] LUMIREE × IKEA — Everyday Surrealism

name: SPRING SOUNDS
intro: A complete visual identity for Spring Sounds — an annual music festival celebrating independent artists, nature, and community. Bold shapes, warm palettes.

caseImages.alt: Spring music festival poster — retro bird playing trumpet with geometric shapes
caseImages.caption: [ 01 ] SPRING SOUNDS — Main Stage Poster

caseImages.alt: Eco sustainability illustration — figure surrounded by colorful abstract trees
caseImages.caption: [ 02 ] SPRING SOUNDS — Eco Initiative

caseImages.alt: Artist spotlight illustration — figure illuminated by neon botanical glow
caseImages.caption: [ 03 ] SPRING SOUNDS — Artist Spotlight Series

name: CRYSTALLINE
intro: A glass-style product photography series that reimagines everyday objects as luminous, translucent sculptures. Where the mundane becomes magical.

caseImages.alt: Glass mushroom sculpture — delicate red-spotted cap with glowing stem
caseImages.caption: [ 01 ] CRYSTALLINE — Mushroom

caseImages.alt: Glass rubber duck — rainbow iridescent with floral patterns
caseImages.caption: [ 02 ] CRYSTALLINE — Rubber Duck

caseImages.alt: Glass flower pot — glowing neon botanical arrangement in spherical vessel
caseImages.caption: [ 03 ] CRYSTALLINE — Flower Pot

caseImages.alt: Glass banana — golden translucent fruit glowing on neutral background
caseImages.caption: [ 04 ] CRYSTALLINE — Banana

name: 中奉
intro: A cultural exhibition identity drawing from centuries of East Asian visual heritage — ink wash, ukiyo-e, Ming Dynasty craft, and contemporary Chinese editorial design.

caseImages.alt: Qingming festival poster — ink wash pagoda with traditional Chinese typography
caseImages.caption: [ 01 ] 中奉 — Qingming Festival

caseImages.alt: Lantern exhibition poster — floral botanical art displayed in subway station
caseImages.caption: [ 02 ] 中奉 — Lantern Exhibition

caseImages.alt: Peony poster — dark moody botanical with glowing orange flower and lone figure
caseImages.caption: [ 03 ] 中奉 — Peony Night

caseImages.alt: Ming Dynasty furniture poster — elegant chair on cream background with Chinese characters
caseImages.caption: [ 04 ] 中奉 — Ming Dynasty Collection

name: RETRO FRAME
intro: A brand identity system spanning logo design, hand lettering, and typographic exploration — from playful mascots to bold retro wordmarks.

name: ATARO'S
intro: A series of cinematic poster designs spanning sci-fi, thriller, and international arthouse — each piece a world unto itself, built for the big screen.

caseImages.caption: [ 01 ] 엄마리 — Korean Arthouse
